applicabilityConditions: Customer value or productivity improvement is identifiable and concrete price or packaging terms can be stated.
recommendedAction: Monetize or repackage verified value with explicit commercial terms and a bounded customer-impact rationale.
nonApplicabilityConditions: Customer value is unverified or commercial terms cannot be stated clearly.
guardrails: Do not infer value from price alone; retain concrete terms and customer-impact boundaries.
exceptions: Defer monetization when packaging friction overwhelms the identifiable customer value.
reversalSignals: Measured customer value weakens, productivity improvement fails to materialize, or adoption friction rises materially.

review.rationale: Reviewed against approved same-axis reflections, source-linked Amy Hood principle evidence, holdout boundaries, explicit guardrails, reversal signals, and five-domain PoC coverage; approved at medium confidence.
